description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nReduces <color=#28d9ed>damage taken</color> by <color=#ffd732>Idith</color> and <color=#ffd732>Nightwatch Waraxe-Wielder</color> by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>. This effect stacks with skills of the same name and is removed upon the caster's death.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n<color=#ffd732>이디스</color>와 <color=#ffd732>기사단 워액스</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>받는 피해</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 감소시킵니다. 이 효과는 동일한 이름을 가진 스킬들과 효과가 합산되며, 사망 시 해제됩니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n<color=#ffd732>【イディス】</color>と<color=#ffd732>【騎士団兵〈斧〉】</color>の<color=#28d9ed>受けるダメージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>DOWNさせる。同名のスキルと効果が重複した場合、効果が合算される。この効果は倒れた時、解除される。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n使<color=#ffd732>伊蒂斯</color>和<color=#ffd732>骑士团战斧兵</color><color=#28d9ed>所受伤害</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。该效果可与同名技能效果叠加,且在死亡时\n解除。
